_note: AUTHORITATIVE mutable current-state source. The ONLY place current operational state is defined. Mutate via `tools/project-state.py transition`; validate via `tools/project-state.py validate`; generated status blocks are rendered from here via `tools/project-state.py render`. Do not duplicate current-state wording elsewhere outside generated blocks.

delivery_governance.branch_strategy: one complete Phase per branch + one PR (phase/<name>-<purpose>); governance-only uses governance/<purpose>; no direct commits to the protected default branch without explicit PO authorization
delivery_governance.merge_gate: PR merge requires the GitHub Actions 'Project Governance' check (job 'governance') to pass; local validator output alone is insufficient (GH-MANDATORY-CI)

current_maturity: Phase 1A ACCEPTED_AND_CLOSED at its DARK maturity; Phase 1B PLANNING (corrected plan pending Product-Owner approval; NOT implemented); permanent GitHub execution/delivery operating rule applied and pending Product-Owner approval

0.title: IAM redesign architecture contract + live PMS validation

2.title: Packages, revisions, rules, tiers, quotes; free purchases; portal package selection

database_schema_state.standby: none (an isolated second-site TEST db stayconnect_site_b exists for isolation tests; NOT a replication standby)

service_routing_state: Legacy public-schema IAM is the SOLE production authority. No service is routed to iam_v2. No DSN/search_path change. All site-DB services currently connect as superuser stayconnect (Gate-P prerequisite to eliminate).
pms_financial_state: FIAS lookup-only in production; posting engine is a future component (Phase 4). folio_identity_strategy DEFAULT 'UNSET' fail-closed. No programmatic reversal (v1). Hotel ID 2 financially UNAPPROVED.
network_ha_state: Two physical NICs (WAN=management, LAN=guest). Local-first/offline supported. HA failover NOT designed/implemented/accepted; HA-sync transport is an open decision.
blockers: MANDATORY Phase-1B prerequisite (Gate P): site-DB services connect as superuser stayconnect; least-privilege roles + credential rotation required before any iam_v2 runtime routing.
allowed_actions: Product-Owner approval of this permanent GitHub execution and delivery operating rule and the corrected Phase 1B plan
prohibited_actions: Any production iam_v2 write (including inside a later-rolled-back transaction)
Granting any iam_v2 DML privilege to a runtime service role in production
DSN/search_path change; routing any service to iam_v2
Data migration into iam_v2; dual-read/dual-write; cutover
PMS/FIAS traffic; financial posting; programmatic reversal
Network/HA/deployment/topology change; Central changes; legacy cleanup
Guest paid access; Phase 2 or any later Phase
next_authorized_action: Product-Owner approval of this permanent GitHub execution and delivery operating rule and the corrected Phase 1B plan
